title: Operator autocycle execute-safe recommended action reason sync from execution v0
problem: Ticket-356 refreshes next_recommended_action.reason in operator loop execute-safe output after successful autonomous loop proof, but operator autocycle execute-safe stores execution without updating evaluation/summary reason from the refreshed payload.
acceptance_criteria: After autocycle execute-safe pass, evaluation and summary next_recommended_action.reason match execution payload when present.
Failed autocycle execute-safe leaves pre-run reason unchanged.
No execute-safe command allowlist changes or queue writes.
rollback_plan: Revert autocycle reason execution sync only.
